entries.name: address-book-new
entries.description: The icon used for the action to create a new address book.

entries.name: application-exit
entries.description:
The icon used for exiting an application. Typically this is seen
in the application's menus as File->Quit.

entries.name: appointment-new
entries.description:
The icon used for the action to create a new appointment
in a calendaring application.

entries.name: call-start
entries.description:
The icon used for initiating or accepting a call. Should be similar
to the standard cellular call pickup icon, a green handset with ear and
mouth pieces facing upward.

entries.name: call-stop
entries.description:
The icon used for stopping a current call. Should be similar
to the standard cellular call hangup icon, a red handset with ear and
mouth pieces facing downward.

entries.name: contact-new
entries.description:
The icon used for the action to create a new contact
in an address book application.

entries.name: document-new
entries.description: The icon used for the action to create a new document.

entries.name: document-open
entries.description: The icon used for the action to open a document.

entries.name: document-open-recent
entries.description:
The icon used for the action to open a document that
was recently opened.

entries.name: document-page-setup
entries.description: The icon for the page setup action of a document editor.

entries.name: document-print
entries.description: The icon for the print action of an application.

entries.name: document-print-preview
entries.description: The icon for the print preview action of an application.

entries.name: document-properties
entries.description:
The icon for the action to view the properties of a
document in an application.

entries.name: document-revert
entries.description:
The icon for the action of reverting to a previous
version of a document.

entries.name: document-save
entries.description:
The icon for the save action. Should be an arrow pointing down and toward
a hard disk.

entries.name: document-save-as
entries.description: The icon for the save as action.

entries.name: document-send
entries.description:
The icon for the send action. Should be an arrow pointing up and away from
a hard disk.

entries.name: edit-clear
entries.description: The icon for the clear action.

entries.name: edit-copy
entries.description: The icon for the copy action.

entries.name: edit-cut
entries.description: The icon for the cut action.

entries.name: edit-delete
entries.description: The icon for the delete action.

entries.name: edit-find
entries.description: The icon for the find action.

entries.name: edit-find-replace
entries.description: The icon for the find and replace action.

entries.name: edit-paste
entries.description: The icon for the paste action.

entries.name: edit-redo
entries.description: The icon for the redo action.

entries.name: edit-select-all
entries.description: The icon for the select all action.

entries.name: edit-undo
entries.description: The icon for the undo action.

entries.name: find-location
entries.description: The icon used for the action of finding the user's physical location

entries.name: folder-new
entries.description: The icon for creating a new folder.

entries.name: format-indent-less
entries.description: The icon for the decrease indent formatting action.

entries.name: format-indent-more
entries.description: The icon for the increase indent formatting action.

entries.name: format-justify-center
entries.description: The icon for the center justification formatting action.

entries.name: format-justify-fill
entries.description: The icon for the fill justification formatting action.

entries.name: format-justify-left
entries.description: The icon for the left justification formatting action.

entries.name: format-justify-right
entries.description: The icon for the right justification action.

entries.name: format-text-direction-ltr
entries.description: The icon for the left-to-right text formatting action.

entries.name: format-text-direction-rtl
entries.description: The icon for the right-to-left formatting action.

entries.name: format-text-bold
entries.description: The icon for the bold text formatting action.

entries.name: format-text-italic
entries.description: The icon for the italic text formatting action.

entries.name: format-text-underline
entries.description: The icon for the underlined text formatting action.

entries.name: format-text-strikethrough
entries.description: The icon for the strikethrough text formatting action.

entries.name: go-bottom
entries.description: The icon for the go to bottom of a list action.

entries.name: go-down
entries.description: The icon for the go down in a list action.

entries.name: go-first
entries.description: The icon for the go to the first item in a list action.

entries.name: go-home
entries.description: The icon for the go to home location action.

entries.name: go-jump
entries.description: The icon for the jump to action.

entries.name: go-last
entries.description: The icon for the go to the last item in a list action.

entries.name: go-next
entries.description: The icon for the go to the next item in a list action.

entries.name: go-previous
entries.description: The icon for the go to the previous item in a list action.

entries.name: go-top
entries.description: The icon for the go to the top of a list action.

entries.name: go-up
entries.description: The icon for the go up in a list action.

entries.name: help-about
entries.description: The icon for the About item in the Help menu.

entries.name: help-contents
entries.description: The icon for Contents item in the Help menu.

entries.name: help-faq
entries.description: The icon for the FAQ item in the Help menu.

entries.name: insert-image
entries.description: The icon for the insert image action of an application.

entries.name: insert-link
entries.description: The icon for the insert link action of an application.

entries.name: insert-object
entries.description: The icon for the insert object action of an application.

entries.name: insert-text
entries.description: The icon for the insert text action of an application.

entries.name: list-add
entries.description: The icon for the add to list action.

entries.name: list-remove
entries.description: The icon for the remove from list action.

entries.name: mail-forward
entries.description: The icon for the forward action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-mark-important
entries.description: The icon for the mark as important action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-mark-junk
entries.description: The icon for the mark as junk action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-mark-notjunk
entries.description: The icon for the mark as not junk action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-mark-read
entries.description: The icon for the mark as read action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-mark-unread
entries.description: The icon for the mark as unread action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-message-new
entries.description: The icon for the compose new mail action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-reply-all
entries.description: The icon for the reply to all action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-reply-sender
entries.description: The icon for the reply to sender action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-send
entries.description: The icon for the send action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: mail-send-receive
entries.description: The icon for the send and receive action of an electronic mail application.

entries.name: media-eject
entries.description: The icon for the eject action of a media player or file manager.

entries.name: media-playback-pause
entries.description: The icon for the pause action of a media player.

entries.name: media-playback-start
entries.description: The icon for the start playback action of a media player.

entries.name: media-playback-stop
entries.description: The icon for the stop action of a media player.

entries.name: media-record
entries.description: The icon for the record action of a media application.

entries.name: media-seek-backward
entries.description: The icon for the seek backward action of a media player.

entries.name: media-seek-forward
entries.description: The icon for the seek forward action of a media player.

entries.name: media-skip-backward
entries.description: The icon for the skip backward action of a media player.

entries.name: media-skip-forward
entries.description: The icon for the skip forward action of a media player.

entries.name: object-flip-horizontal
entries.description: The icon for the action to flip an object horizontally.

entries.name: object-flip-vertical
entries.description: The icon for the action to flip an object vertically.

entries.name: object-rotate-left
entries.description: The icon for the rotate left action performed on an object.

entries.name: object-rotate-right
entries.description: The icon for the rotate rigt action performed on an object.

entries.name: process-stop
entries.description:
The icon used for theStopaction in applications with actions
that may take a while to process, such as web page loading in a browser.

entries.name: system-lock-screen
entries.description:
The icon used for theLock Screenitem in the desktop's
panel application.

entries.name: system-log-out
entries.description:
The icon used for theLog Outitem in
the desktop's panel application.

entries.name: system-run
entries.description:
The icon used for theRun Application...item in
the desktop's panel application.

entries.name: system-search
entries.description:
The icon used for theSearchitem in
the desktop's panel application.

entries.name: system-reboot
entries.description:
The icon used for theRebootitem in
the desktop's panel application.

entries.name: system-shutdown
entries.description:
The icon used for theShutdownitem in
the desktop's panel application.

entries.name: tools-check-spelling
entries.description:
The icon used for theCheck Spellingitem in the
application'sToolsmenu.

entries.name: view-fullscreen
entries.description:
The icon used for theFullscreenitem in the
application'sViewmenu.

entries.name: view-refresh
entries.description:
The icon used for theRefreshitem in the
application'sViewmenu.

entries.name: view-restore
entries.description:
The icon used by an application for leaving the fullscreen view, and returning
to a normal windowed view.

entries.name: view-sort-ascending
entries.description:
The icon used for theSort Ascendingitem in the
application'sViewmenu, or in a button for
changing the sort method for a list.

entries.name: view-sort-descending
entries.description:
The icon used for theSort Descendingitem in the
application'sViewmenu, or in a button for
changing the sort method for a list.

entries.name: window-close
entries.description:
The icon used for theClose Windowitem in the
application'sWindowsmenu.

entries.name: window-new
entries.description:
The icon used for theNew Windowitem in the
application'sWindowsmenu.

entries.name: zoom-fit-best
entries.description:
The icon used for theBest Fititem in the
application'sViewmenu.

entries.name: zoom-in
entries.description:
The icon used for theZoom initem in the
application'sViewmenu.

entries.name: zoom-original
entries.description:
The icon used for theOriginal Sizeitem in the
application'sViewmenu.

entries.name: zoom-out
entries.description:
The icon used for theZoom Outitem in the
application'sViewmenu.

entries.name: process-working
entries.description:
This is the standard spinner animation for web browsers and
file managers to show that the location is loading.

entries.name: accessories-calculator
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's calculator accessory program.

entries.name: accessories-character-map
entries.description:
The icon used for the desktop's international and extended text
character accessory program.

entries.name: accessories-dictionary
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's dictionary accessory program.

entries.name: accessories-screenshot-tool
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's screenshot taking program.

entries.name: accessories-text-editor
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's text editing accessory program.

entries.name: help-browser
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's help browsing application.

entries.name: multimedia-volume-control
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's hardware volume control application.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-accessibility
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's accessibility preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-font
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's font preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-keyboard
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's keyboard preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-locale
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's locale preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-multimedia
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's multimedia preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-screensaver
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's screen saving preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-theme
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's theme preferences.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-wallpaper
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's wallpaper preferences.

entries.name: system-file-manager
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's file management application.

entries.name: system-software-install
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's software installer application.

entries.name: system-software-update
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's software updating application.

entries.name: utilities-system-monitor
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's system resource monitor application.

entries.name: utilities-terminal
entries.description: The icon used for the desktop's terminal emulation application.

entries.name: applications-accessories
entries.description: The icon for theAccessoriessub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-development
entries.description: The icon for theProgrammingsub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-engineering
entries.description: The icon for theEngineeringsub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-games
entries.description: The icon for theGamessub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-graphics
entries.description: The icon for theGraphicssub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.description: The icon for theInternetsub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-multimedia
entries.description: The icon for theMultimediasub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-office
entries.description: The icon for theOfficesub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-other
entries.description: The icon for theOthersub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-science
entries.description: The icon for theSciencesub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-system
entries.description: The icon for theSystem Toolssub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: applications-utilities
entries.description: The icon for theUtilitiessub-menu of the Programs menu.

entries.name: preferences-desktop
entries.description: The icon for theDesktop Preferencescategory.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-peripherals
entries.description:
The icon for thePeripheralssub-category of
theDesktop Preferencescategory.

entries.name: preferences-desktop-personal
entries.description:
The icon for thePersonalsub-category of
theDesktop Preferencescategory.

entries.name: preferences-other
entries.description: The icon for theOtherpreferences category.

entries.name: preferences-system
entries.description: The icon for theSystem Preferencescategory.

entries.name: preferences-system-network
entries.description:
The icon for theNetworksub-category of
theSystem Preferencescategory.

entries.name: system-help
entries.description: The icon for theHelpsystem category.

entries.name: audio-card
entries.description: The icon used for the audio rendering device.

entries.name: audio-input-microphone
entries.description: The icon used for the microphone audio input device.

entries.name: battery
entries.description: The icon used for the system battery device.

entries.name: camera-photo
entries.description: The icon used for a digital still camera devices.

entries.name: camera-video
entries.description: The fallback icon for video cameras.

entries.name: camera-web
entries.description: The fallback icon for web cameras.

entries.name: computer
entries.description: The icon used for the computing device as a whole.

entries.name: drive-harddisk
entries.description: The icon used for hard disk drives.

entries.name: drive-optical
entries.description: The icon used for optical media drives such as CD and DVD.

entries.name: drive-removable-media
entries.description: The icon used for removable media drives.

entries.name: input-gaming
entries.description: The icon used for the gaming input device.

entries.name: input-keyboard
entries.description: The icon used for the keyboard input device.

entries.name: input-mouse
entries.description: The icon used for the mousing input device.

entries.name: input-tablet
entries.description: The icon used for graphics tablet input devices.

entries.name: media-flash
entries.description: The fallback icon used for flash media, such as memory stick and SD.

entries.name: media-floppy
entries.description: The icon used for physical floppy disk media.

entries.name: media-optical
entries.description: The icon used for physical optical media such as CD and DVD.

entries.name: media-tape
entries.description: The icon used for generic physical tape media.

entries.name: modem
entries.description: The icon used for modem devices.

entries.name: multimedia-player
entries.description: The icon used for generic multimedia playing devices.

entries.name: network-wired
entries.description: The icon used for wired network connections.

entries.name: network-wireless
entries.description: The icon used for wireless network connections.

entries.name: pda
entries.description:
This is the fallback icon for Personal Digial Assistant devices. Primary use
of this icon is for PDA devices connected to the PC. Connection medium is not
an important aspect of the icon. The metaphor for this fallback icon should be
a generic PDA device icon.

entries.name: phone
entries.description:
This is the default fallback for phone devices. Primary use of this icon group
is for phone devices which support connectivity to the PC. These may be VoIP,
cellular, or possibly landline phones. The metaphor for this fallback should be
a generic mobile phone device.

entries.name: printer
entries.description: The icon used for a printer device.

entries.name: scanner
entries.description: The icon used for a scanner device.

entries.name: video-display
entries.description: The icon used for the monitor that video gets displayed to.

entries.name: emblem-default
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem to specify the default selection of a printer for
example.

entries.name: emblem-documents
entries.description: The icon used as an emblem for the directory where a user's documents are stored.

entries.name: emblem-downloads
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for the directory where a user's
downloads from the internet are stored.

entries.name: emblem-favorite
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for files and directories that the
user marks as favorites.

entries.name: emblem-important
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for files and directories that are
marked as important by the user.

entries.name: emblem-mail
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem to specify the directory where the
user's electronic mail is stored.

entries.name: emblem-photos
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem to specify the directory where the
user stores photographs.

entries.name: emblem-readonly
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for files and directories which can
not be written to by the user.

entries.name: emblem-shared
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for files and directories that are
shared to other users.

entries.name: emblem-symbolic-link
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for files and direcotires that are
links to other files or directories on the filesystem.

entries.name: emblem-synchronized
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for files or directories that are
configured to be synchronized to another device.

entries.name: emblem-system
entries.description:
The icon used as an emblem for directories that contain system
libraries, settings, and data.

entries.name: emblem-unreadable
entries.description: The icon used as an emblem for files and directories that are inaccessible.

entries.name: face-angel
entries.description: The icon used for the 0:-) emote.

entries.name: face-angry
entries.description: The icon used for the X-( emote.

entries.name: face-cool
entries.description: The icon used for the B-) emote.

entries.name: face-crying
entries.description: The icon used for the :'( emote.

entries.name: face-devilish
entries.description: The icon used for the >:-) emote.

entries.name: face-embarrassed
entries.description: The icon used for the :-[ emote.

entries.name: face-kiss
entries.description: The icon used for the :-* emote.

entries.name: face-laugh
entries.description: The icon used for the :-)) emote.

entries.name: face-monkey
entries.description: The icon used for the :-(|) emote.

entries.name: face-plain
entries.description: The icon used for the :-| emote.

entries.name: face-raspberry
entries.description: The icon used for the :-P emote.

entries.name: face-sad
entries.description: The icon used for the :-( emote.

entries.name: face-sick
entries.description: The icon used for the :-& emote.

entries.name: face-smile
entries.description: The icon used for the :-) emote.

entries.name: face-smile-big
entries.description: The icon used for the :-D emote.

entries.name: face-smirk
entries.description: The icon used for the :-! emote.

entries.name: face-surprise
entries.description: The icon used for the :-0 emote.

entries.name: face-tired
entries.description: The icon used for the |-) emote.

entries.name: face-uncertain
entries.description: The icon used for the :-/ emote.

entries.name: face-wink
entries.description: The icon used for the ;-) emote.

entries.name: face-worried
entries.description: The icon used for the :-S emote.

entries.name: flag-aa
entries.description:
The flag for the country with the ISO 3166 country code AA. All
flags should use ISO 3166 two-letter country codes, in lowercase
form, as the specifier for the country.

entries.name: application-x-executable
entries.description: The icon used for executable file types.

entries.name: audio-x-generic
entries.description: The icon used for generic audio file types.

entries.name: font-x-generic
entries.description: The icon used for generic font file types.

entries.name: image-x-generic
entries.description: The icon used for generic image file types.

entries.name: package-x-generic
entries.description: The icon used for generic package file types.

entries.name: text-html
entries.description: The icon used for HTML text file types.

entries.name: text-x-generic
entries.description: The icon used for generic text file types.

entries.name: text-x-generic-template
entries.description: The icon used for generic text templates.

entries.name: text-x-script
entries.description: The icon used for script file types, such as shell scripts.

entries.name: video-x-generic
entries.description: The icon used for generic video file types.

entries.name: x-office-address-book
entries.description: The icon used for generic address book file types.

entries.name: x-office-calendar
entries.description: The icon used for generic calendar file types.

entries.name: x-office-document
entries.description: The icon used for generic document and letter file types.

entries.name: x-office-presentation
entries.description: The icon used for generic presentation file types.

entries.name: x-office-spreadsheet
entries.description: The icon used for generic spreadsheet file types.

entries.name: folder
entries.description:
The standard folder icon used to represent directories on local
filesystems, mail folders, and other hierarchical groups.

entries.name: folder-remote
entries.description: The icon used for normal directories on a remote filesystem.

entries.name: network-server
entries.description: The icon used for individual host machines under theNetwork Serversplace in the file manager.

entries.name: network-workgroup
entries.description:
The icon for theNetwork Serversplace in the
desktop's file manager, and workgroups within the network.

entries.name: start-here
entries.description:
The icon used by the desktop's main menu for accessing places,
applications, and other features.

entries.name: user-bookmarks
entries.description: The icon for the user's specialBookmarksplace.

entries.name: user-desktop
entries.description: The icon for the specialDesktopdirectory of the user.

entries.name: user-home
entries.description: The icon for the specialHomedirectory of the user.

entries.name: user-trash
entries.description:
The icon for the user'sTrashplace in the
desktop's file manager.

entries.name: appointment-missed
entries.description: The icon used when an appointment was missed.

entries.name: appointment-soon
entries.description: The icon used when an appointment will occur soon.

entries.name: audio-volume-high
entries.description: The icon used to indicate high audio volume.

entries.name: audio-volume-low
entries.description: The icon used to indicate low audio volume.

entries.name: audio-volume-medium
entries.description: The icon used to indicate medium audio volume.

entries.name: audio-volume-muted
entries.description: The icon used to indicate the muted state for audio playback.

entries.name: battery-caution
entries.description: The icon used when the battery is below 40%.

entries.name: battery-low
entries.description: The icon used when the battery is below 20%.

entries.name: dialog-error
entries.description:
The icon used when a dialog is opened to explain an error
condition to the user.

entries.name: dialog-information
entries.description:
The icon used when a dialog is opened to give information
to the user that may be pertinent to the requested action.

entries.name: dialog-password
entries.description:
The icon used when a dialog requesting the authentication
credentials for a user is opened.

entries.name: dialog-question
entries.description:
The icon used when a dialog is opened to ask a simple
	      question of the user.

entries.name: dialog-warning
entries.description:
The icon used when a dialog is opened to warn the user of
impending issues with the requested action.

entries.name: folder-drag-accept
entries.description:
The icon used for a folder while an object is being
dragged onto it, that is of a type that the directory can contain.

entries.name: folder-open
entries.description:
The icon used for folders, while their contents are being
displayed within the same window. This icon would normally be
shown in a tree or list view, next to the main view of a folder's contents.

entries.name: folder-visiting
entries.description:
The icon used for folders, while their contents are being
displayed in another window. This icon would typically be used
when using multiple windows to navigate the hierarchy, such as
in Nautilus's spatial mode.

entries.name: image-loading
entries.description:
The icon used when another image is being loaded, such as
thumnails for larger images in the file manager.

entries.name: image-missing
entries.description: The icon used when another image could not be loaded.

entries.name: mail-attachment
entries.description: The icon used for an electronic mail that contains attachments.

entries.name: mail-unread
entries.description: The icon used for an electronic mail that is unread.

entries.name: mail-read
entries.description: The icon used for an electronic mail that is read.

entries.name: mail-replied
entries.description: The icon used for an electronic mail that has been replied to.

entries.name: mail-signed
entries.description: The icon used for an electronic mail that contains a signature.

entries.name: mail-signed-verified
entries.description:
The icon used for an electronic mail that contains a signature
which has also been verified by the security system.

entries.name: media-playlist-repeat
entries.description: The icon for the repeat mode of a media player.

entries.name: media-playlist-shuffle
entries.description: The icon for the shuffle mode of a media player.

entries.name: network-error
entries.description:
The icon used when an error occurs trying to intialize the network connection
of the computing device. This icon should be two computers, one in the
background, with the screens of both computers, colored black, and with the
theme's style element for errors, overlayed on top of the icon.

entries.name: network-idle
entries.description:
The icon used when no data is being transmitted or received, while the
computing device is connected to a network. This icon should be two computers,
one in the background, with the screens of both computers, colored black.

entries.name: network-offline
entries.description:
The icon used when the computing device is disconnected from the network. This
icon should be a computer in the background, with a screen colored black, and
the theme's icon element to show that a device is not accessible, in the
foreground.

entries.name: network-receive
entries.description:
The icon used when data is being received, while the computing device is
connected to a network. This icon should be two computers, one in the
background, with its screen colored green, and the screen of the computer in
the foreground, colored black.

entries.name: network-transmit
entries.description:
The icon used when data is being transmitted, while the computing device is
connected to a network. This icon should be two computers, one in the
background, with its screen colored black, and the screen of the computer in
the foreground, colored green.

entries.name: network-transmit-receive
entries.description:
The icon used data is being both transmitted and received simultaneously,
while the computing device is connected to a network. This icon should be two
computers, one in the background, with the screens of both computers, colored
green.

entries.name: printer-error
entries.description:
The icon used when an error occurs while attempting to print. This icon should
be the theme's printer device icon, with the theme's style element for errors,
overlayed on top of the icon.

entries.name: printer-printing
entries.description:
The icon used while a print job is successfully being spooled to a printing
device. This icon should be the theme's printer device icon, with a document
emerging from the printing device.

entries.name: security-high
entries.description:
The icon used to indicate that the security level of a connection is known
to be secure, using strong encryption and a valid certificate.

entries.name: security-medium
entries.description:
The icon used to indicate that the security level of a connection is presumed
to be secure, using strong encryption, and a certificate that could not be
automatically verified, but which the user has chosen to trust.

entries.name: security-low
entries.description:
The icon used to indicate that the security level of a connection is presumed
to be insecure, either by using weak encryption, or by using a certificate that
the could not be automatically verified, and which the user has not chosent to
trust.

entries.name: software-update-available
entries.description:
The icon used when an update is available for software installed
on the computing device, through the system software update program.

entries.name: software-update-urgent
entries.description:
The icon used when an urgent update is available through the
system software update program.

entries.name: sync-error
entries.description:
The icon used when an error occurs while attempting to
synchronize data from the computing device, to another device.

entries.name: sync-synchronizing
entries.description: The icon used while data is successfully synchronizing to another device.

entries.name: task-due
entries.description: The icon used when a task is due soon.

entries.name: task-past-due
entries.description: The icon used when a task that was due, has been left incomplete.

entries.name: user-available
entries.description:
The icon used when a user on a chat network is available to
initiate a conversation with.

entries.name: user-away
entries.description:
The icon used when a user on a chat network is away from their
keyboard and the chat program.

entries.name: user-idle
entries.description:
The icon used when a user on a chat network has not been an
active participant in any chats on the network, for an extended period of time.

entries.name: user-offline
entries.description: The icon used when a user on a chat network is not available.

entries.name: user-trash-full
entries.description:
The icon for the user'sTrashin the desktop's
file manager, when there are items in theTrashwaiting for disposal or recovery.

entries.name: weather-clear
entries.description: The icon used while the weather for a region isclear skies.

entries.name: weather-clear-night
entries.description: The icon used while the weather for a region isclear skiesduring the night.

entries.name: weather-few-clouds
entries.description: The icon used while the weather for a region ispartly cloudy.

entries.name: weather-few-clouds-night
entries.description: The icon used while the weather for a region ispartly cloudyduring the night.

entries.name: weather-fog
entries.description: The icon used while the weather for a region isfoggy.

entries.name: weather-overcast
entries.description: The icon used while the weather for a region isovercast.

entries.name: weather-severe-alert
entries.description: The icon used while a sever weather alert is in effect for a region.

entries.name: weather-showers
entries.description: The icon used while rain showers are occurring in a region.

entries.name: weather-showers-scattered
entries.description: The icon used while scattered rain showers are occurring in a region.

entries.name: weather-snow
entries.description: The icon used while snow showers are occurring in a region.

entries.name: weather-storm
entries.description: The icon used while storms are occurring in a region.
